summary: Iteration 110: Tested Employment Gap Detection and Verification feature. All 18 backend tests passed. Fixed critical frontend bug where complianceFile was not defined in EmployeeProfilePage.js. Employment Gap Verification section now displays correctly showing detected gaps with status badges (pending, explained, verified, rejected, needs_more_info). Backend endpoints for gap detection, explanation, verification, and request-info all working correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Employment Gap Verification section displays correctly with gap cards, status badges, and admin actions)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing employees with employment gaps
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employment Gap Detection and Verification feature fully implemented. Key endpoints: GET /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps (returns gap detection and verification status), POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps/{gap_id}/explain (submit explanation), POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps/{gap_id}/verify (approve/reject), POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps/{gap_id}/request-info (request more info), POST /api/employees/{id}/detect-employment-gaps (re-detect gaps). Compliance file includes employment_history section with gap_evaluation. Approval engine includes employment_history_verification in required items. EmploymentGapPanel component displays gap cards with status badges and admin actions.

get_employment_gaps_endpoint.details: GET /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps returns 200 with employee_id, has_gaps, total_gaps, gaps array, evaluation object

detect_employment_gaps_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/detect-employment-gaps returns 200 with status, message, gaps_detected count

explain_gap_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps/{gap_id}/explain accepts explanation parameter and updates gap status to 'explained'

verify_gap_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps/{gap_id}/verify accepts approved boolean and updates status to 'verified' or 'rejected'

request_info_endpoint.details: POST /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps/{gap_id}/request-info accepts request_message and updates status to 'needs_more_info'

compliance_file_employment_history.details: Compliance file includes employment_history section with rows containing key='employment_history_verification', row_type='employment_gap', has_gaps, is_verified, gap_evaluation

recruitment_approval_integration.details: Recruitment approval check includes employment_history_verification in required_keys for nurse and healthcare_assistant roles

gap_status_values.details: Gap status can be: pending, explained, verified, rejected, needs_more_info

employment_gap_panel_ui.details: EmploymentGapPanel displays gap cards with duration, date range, status badges, and expand/collapse functionality

admin_gap_actions.details: Admin can verify/reject gaps via EmploymentGapPanel with appropriate dialogs

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/employees/{id}/employment-gaps - 200 OK with gap detection and verification status
POST /api/employees/{id}/detect-employment-gaps - 200 OK re-detects gaps from employment history
GET /api/employees/{id}/compliance-file - includes employment_history section with gap_evaluation
GET /api/employees/{id}/recruitment-approval-check - includes employment_history_verification in required items

bug_fixed.issue: ReferenceError: complianceFile is not defined in EmployeeProfilePage.js
bug_fixed.root_cause: The EmployeeProfilePage component was using complianceFile variable without declaring it as state or fetching it
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added complianceFile state variable and fetchComplianceFile function to EmployeeProfilePage.js, and added fetchComplianceFile() call to useEffect
